relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/Organoid media Recipes 20190408_Huntsman Lab.docx
full_text:
Progenitor Isolation Media (40ml)

Volume Final Conc

Advanced DMEM/F12 (fridge) 36.7ml

HEPES (fridge) 480ul 12mM

Glutamax (room temp) 400ul 1%

FBS (fridge) 2ml 5%

hEGF (freezer) 4ul 10ng/ml

ROCK inhibitor (freezer) 40ul 9uM

Pen/Strep (or anti/anti, fridge) 400ul 1%

TGF-B RKI VI (5mM) (freezer) 4ul 0.5uM

Organoid Expansion Media

Volume Final Conc

Advanced DMEM/F12 (fridge) 17.1ml

HEPES (fridge) 480ul 12mM

Glutamax (room temp) 400ul 1%

B27 (50X) (fridge) 800ul 2%

N2 (100X) (fridge) 400ul 1%

hEGF (0.1mg/ml) (freezer) 4ul 10ng/ml

hNoggin (0.1mg/ml)(freezer) 4ul 100ng/ml

hFGF10 (0.1mg/ml)(freezer) 4ul 100ng/ml

nicotinamide (fridge) 400ul 1mM

ROCK inhibitor (freezer) 40ul 9uM

TGF-B RKI IV (5mM) (freezer) 4ul 0.5uM

Pen/Strep (or anti/anti, fridge) 400ul 1%

R Spondin CM (freezer) 10ml 25%

Wnt3a CM (freezer) 10ml 25%

Rs Spondin 20ug room temp, R Spondin 1mg/ml final

rhWnt-3a 10ug freezer in lab

(Wnt3a 1mg/ml add 1ul to 10ml media to get final 100 ng/ml)

Nicotinamide 1g fridge MW 122.13 50mg/ml in H2O

TGFb inhibitor MW 420.42 5mg fridge DMSO 100mg/ml or EtOH 10mg/ml

N2 supplement freezer liquid 100X
